Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 63 

PHYS_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Part B Physician Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for the Part B physician office services (PHYS) for a given 
year. Physician office claims are a subset of the claim lines in the Part B carrier and DME data files, and a 
subset of physician evaluation and management (E/M) claim lines (NOTE: E/M are tabulated
